title: felicia amoena subsp. stricta
intro: Felicia amoena subsp. stricta, also known as strict blue felicia, is a subspecies of the Felicia amoena plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is a shrub-like perennial that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Felicia amoena subsp. stricta include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
